title: Quota, Rate-Limit, And Switch Recommendation
scope: Detect quota and rate-limit signals from Codex output and managed actions.
Recommend account switch when quota or invalid token blocks work, without auto-switching by default.
non_goals: Do not claim perfect official quota truth.
Do not automatically switch accounts unless the user explicitly opts in later.
Do not merge quota exhaustion with token invalidation.

tasks.title: Add rate-limit detector
tasks.details: Detect common Codex quota, upgrade, purchase, retry, and rate-limit messages.

tasks.title: Store retry availability
tasks.details: Persist retry availability per account in account state.

tasks.title: Show retry time in Accounts list
tasks.details: Render retry/reset time and rate-limited badge per account.

tasks.title: Add card blocking warning
tasks.details: Show a small warning on cards only when bound action is blocked by quota or invalid token.

tasks.title: Add switch recommended state
tasks.details: Recommend a valid profile without auto-switching.

tasks.title: Add token-invalid detector
tasks.details: Detect invalid token from probes, CLI output, and activation validation.

tasks.title: Add explicit Switch Account action
tasks.details: Expose switch action from blocking warning states with exact target profile.

acceptance: Quota messages become visible structured state.
No automatic account switch occurs without explicit user opt-in.
Token invalidation and quota exhaustion are separate states in UI and trace.

implementation_notes.summary: Added a pure, bounded `detectRateLimitSignal` helper in `src/host/account-manager.js` to match common quota/rate-limit/upgrade/retry message patterns and wired probe credential errors to return structured `rate_limited` signals.

Persisted per-account retry availability in accounts state by updating `accountsState.retryAvailabilityByAccount` from `probeAccountCredentials`, adding helpers for extracting retry windows, and adding cleanup behavior for non-rate-limit failures.

Adjusted Accounts page rendering to consistently format and show retry timing text for rate-limited profiles (`Retry status`), kept the rate-limited badge, and added regression coverage for this visibility in `src/webview/render-detail-regression.test.js`.
Added running-card quota-block badges when the active Codex account has active `retryAvailabilityByAccount` state and added running board regression coverage for both compact and standard cards.

Added explicit invalid-credential pattern detection in `src/host/account-manager.js`, including explicit `detectInvalidCredentialSignal`, probe-level invalid-state persistence (`tokenHealth: "invalid"` plus refresh hints), and activation refresh-path invalid handling for refresh failures during validation.

Added conservative non-actionable switch recommendations in `src/webview-template.js` and styling updates in `src/webview/styles.js` to surface active token/rate-limit blocking and a recommended alternate account path on accounts and board cards.
Added explicit `Switch Account` button wiring in account warning states to post `activateCodexAccount` for the recommended profile, and added regression coverage for emitted postMessage.
Marked phase-05 quota/rate-limit awareness as completed: all planned task statuses are `done`; phase-level completion now mirrors roadmap phase completion and moves loop focus to the next subtask.

Closed the remaining Phase 5 detector acceptance gap by classifying `usage limit` plus upgrade-plan wording as quota exhaustion in `detectRateLimitSignal`, aligning the detector with the roadmap requirement to catch common quota/upgrade messages.

verification_results.command: node -e "const mgr = require('./src/host/account-manager'); const cases = ['HTTP 429 Too Many Requests', 'Quota exceeded for account', 'Retry after 30 seconds', '401 Unauthorized']; console.log(cases.map((c) => !!mgr.detectRateLimitSignal(c) ? mgr.detectRateLimitSignal(c).message : 'no-match').join('|'));"

node -e "const mgr = require('./src/host/account-manager'); const cases = ['Retry in 2 days', 'Retry after 1 d', 'Quota exceeded for account']; const out = cases.map((c) => { const signal = mgr.detectRateLimitSignal(c); return signal ? [signal.code, String(signal.retryAfterSeconds || '')].join(':') : 'no-match'; }); console.log(out.join('|'));"

verification_results.result: failed (webview inline script parse error in node:test harness: missing ) after argument list in vm-loaded webview script; likely pre-existing test fixture/parser issue unrelated to new UI string path)

verification_results.command: node -e "const mgr=require('./src/host/account-manager'); const cases=['HTTP 401 Unauthorized','403 Forbidden: invalid token','rate limit']; const out=cases.map((c)=>mgr.detectInvalidCredentialSignal(c)?.code||mgr.detectRateLimitSignal(c)?.code||'none'); console.log(out.join('|'));"

node -e "const mgr=require('./src/host/account-manager'); const cases=['You have reached your usage limit. Upgrade your plan.','HTTP 429 Too Many Requests','Retry after 30 seconds','Quota exceeded for account','Billing issue: please upgrade plan','ordinary non-match']; const out=cases.map((c)=>mgr.detectRateLimitSignal(c)?.code||'no-match'); console.log(out.join('|'));"
